creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission Mokhi.

Since devel/boost-all already exists, this can't be a new port. Alternatively, did you intend to create a new port under a different name?

If this *is* an update of the existing devel/boost-* ports, please provide your changes as a single unified diff against the port head (via svn diff)

Please also confirm the changes pass Quality Assurance (QA), via portlint and  poudriere

You can find more information and instructions here: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
